text:
INTRVNS_MDCTN_14_CD INTRVNS_MDCTN_14_CD O0110H1B Other: IV Medications (14 days) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received IV medications while a resident of the facility and within the last 14 days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
994 INTRVNS_MDCTN_DSCHRG_CD INTRVNS_MDCTN_DSCHRG_CD O0110H1C Other: IV Medications (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received IV medications in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes
